## Qualifiers.QualifierTypes.IQualifierType.setIndex() method

Sets the index for this qualifier type. Once set, index is immutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setIndex(index: QualifierTypeIndex): Result<QualifierTypeIndex>;
```
